action_mappings_indef.release_clearing_channel_reservation: release reservation of a clearing channel {} for an ach batch {}

predicate_mappings.batch_funding_hold: the batch {} is on funding hold
predicate_mappings.batch_operator_validated: the batch {} is validated by the operator
predicate_mappings.batch_reserved_originating_bank: the batch {} is reserved by the originating bank {}
predicate_mappings.batch_reserved_beneficiary_bank: the batch {} is reserved by the beneficiary bank {}
predicate_mappings.batch_reserved_alternate_rail: the batch {} is reserved by the alternate rail {}
predicate_mappings.batch_reserved_clearing_channel: the batch {} is reserved by the clearing channel {}
predicate_mappings.batch_scheduled_in_window: the batch {} is scheduled in the settlement window {}
predicate_mappings.batch_scheduling_confirmed: the scheduling of batch {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.batch_liquidity_cleared: the liquidity for batch {} is cleared

preconditions: I can only register an ach batch A if it is not the case that the batch A is registered and it is not the case that batch A is finalized
effects: Once I register an ach batch A, it is the case that the batch A is registered

reserve_funding_for_batch.description: reserve funding for an ach batch A using a funding account B
preconditions: I can only reserve funding for an ach batch A using a funding account B if it is the case that the batch A is registered and funding account B is available and B is an eligible funding account for batch A
I can only reserve funding for an ach batch A using a funding account B if it is not the case that the batch A is on funding hold
effects: Once I reserve funding for an ach batch A using a funding account B, it is the case that the batch A is allocated to the funding account B and the batch A is on funding hold
Once I reserve funding for an ach batch A using a funding account B, it is not the case anymore that funding account B is available

release_funding_from_batch.description: release funding from an ach batch A using a funding account B
preconditions: I can only release funding from an ach batch A using a funding account B if it is the case that the batch A is allocated to the funding account B

I can only release funding from an ach batch A using a funding account B if it is not the case that the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and it is not the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared
effects: Once I release funding from an ach batch A using a funding account B, it is the case that funding account B is available

Once I release funding from an ach batch A using a funding account B, it is not the case anymore that the batch A is allocated to the funding account B and it is not the case anymore that the batch A is on funding hold and it is not the case anymore that the batch A has routing locked and it is not the case anymore that the batch A is validated by the operator and it is not the case anymore that batch A is pending operator approval and it is not the case anymore that batch A is ready for execution and it is not the case anymore that batch A requires additional checks

attach_file_resource.description: attach a nacha file resource B to an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only attach a nacha file resource B to an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is registered and file resource B is available
effects: Once I attach a nacha file resource B to an ach batch A, it is the case that batch A has file resource B
Once I attach a nacha file resource B to an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that file resource B is available

detach_file_resource.description: detach a nacha file resource B from an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only detach a nacha file resource B from an ach batch A if it is the case that batch A has file resource B
effects: Once I detach a nacha file resource B from an ach batch A, it is the case that file resource B is available
Once I detach a nacha file resource B from an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that batch A has file resource B

lock_batch_routing.description: lock routing for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B
preconditions: I can only lock routing for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B if it is the case that the batch A is registered and the batch A is on funding hold and batch A has file resource B
I can only lock routing for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B if it is not the case that the batch A has routing locked
effects: Once I lock routing for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B, it is the case that the batch A has routing locked

apply_authorization_credential.description: apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is registered and the batch A is on funding hold and authorization credential B is available
I can only apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A if it is not the case that the batch A has routing locked
effects: Once I apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A, it is the case that the batch A has routing locked and batch A is pending operator approval
Once I apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that authorization credential B is available

operator_validate_batch.description: validate an ach batch A using a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C
preconditions: I can only validate an ach batch A using a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C if it is the case that the batch A has routing locked and the batch A is on funding hold and batch A has file resource B and clearing operator C is available
I can only validate an ach batch A using a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C if it is not the case that the batch A is validated by the operator
effects: Once I validate an ach batch A using a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C, it is the case that the batch A is validated by the operator
Once I validate an ach batch A using a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C, it is not the case anymore that batch A is pending operator approval

operator_validate_rail_binding.description: operator validate rail binding an ach batch A a destination rail B
preconditions: I can only operator validate rail binding an ach batch A a destination rail B if it is the case that the batch A is on funding hold and batch A is bound to destination rail B
I can only operator validate rail binding an ach batch A a destination rail B if it is not the case that the batch A is validated by the operator
effects: Once I operator validate rail binding an ach batch A a destination rail B, it is the case that the batch A is validated by the operator
Once I operator validate rail binding an ach batch A a destination rail B, it is not the case anymore that batch A is pending operator approval

reserve_originating_bank_for_batch.description: reserve an ach batch A for an originating bank B
preconditions: I can only reserve an ach batch A for an originating bank B if it is the case that the batch A is registered and originating bank B is available and B is the eligible originating bank for batch A
effects: Once I reserve an ach batch A for an originating bank B, it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the originating bank B
Once I reserve an ach batch A for an originating bank B, it is not the case anymore that originating bank B is available

release_originating_bank_reservation.description: release reservation of an ach batch A by an originating bank B
preconditions: I can only release reservation of an ach batch A by an originating bank B if it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the originating bank B
effects: Once I release reservation of an ach batch A by an originating bank B, it is the case that originating bank B is available
Once I release reservation of an ach batch A by an originating bank B, it is not the case anymore that the batch A is reserved by the originating bank B

reserve_beneficiary_bank_for_batch.description: reserve a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only reserve a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is registered and beneficiary bank B is available and B is the eligible beneficiary bank for batch A
effects: Once I reserve a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A, it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank B
Once I reserve a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that beneficiary bank B is available

release_beneficiary_bank_reservation.description: release reservation of a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank B
effects: Once I release reservation of a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A, it is the case that beneficiary bank B is available
Once I release reservation of a beneficiary bank B for an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank B

reserve_alternate_rail_for_batch.description: reserve an alternate rail B for an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only reserve an alternate rail B for an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is registered and alternate rail B is available and B is the eligible alternate rail for batch A
effects: Once I reserve an alternate rail B for an ach batch A, it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the alternate rail B
Once I reserve an alternate rail B for an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that alternate rail B is available

release_alternate_rail_reservation.description: release reservation of an ach batch A from an alternate rail B
preconditions: I can only release reservation of an ach batch A from an alternate rail B if it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the alternate rail B
effects: Once I release reservation of an ach batch A from an alternate rail B, it is the case that alternate rail B is available
Once I release reservation of an ach batch A from an alternate rail B, it is not the case anymore that the batch A is reserved by the alternate rail B

reserve_clearing_channel_for_batch.description: reserve a clearing channel B for an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clearing channel B for an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is registered and clearing channel B is available and B is the eligible clearing channel for batch A
effects: Once I reserve a clearing channel B for an ach batch A, it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the clearing channel B
Once I reserve a clearing channel B for an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that clearing channel B is available

release_clearing_channel_reservation.description: release reservation of a clearing channel B for an ach batch A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a clearing channel B for an ach batch A if it is the case that the batch A is reserved by the clearing channel B
effects: Once I release reservation of a clearing channel B for an ach batch A, it is the case that clearing channel B is available
Once I release reservation of a clearing channel B for an ach batch A, it is not the case anymore that the batch A is reserved by the clearing channel B

schedule_batch_into_window.description: schedule an ach batch A into a settlement window B with an originating bank C and a beneficiary bank D
preconditions: I can only schedule an ach batch A into a settlement window B with an originating bank C and a beneficiary bank D if it is the case that the batch A is on funding hold and the batch A is reserved by the originating bank C and the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank D and settlement window B is available and B is the eligible settlement window for batch A
I can only schedule an ach batch A into a settlement window B with an originating bank C and a beneficiary bank D if it is not the case that the scheduling of batch A is confirmed
effects: Once I schedule an ach batch A into a settlement window B with an originating bank C and a beneficiary bank D, it is the case that the batch A is scheduled in the settlement window B and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed
Once I schedule an ach batch A into a settlement window B with an originating bank C and a beneficiary bank D, it is not the case anymore that settlement window B is available

schedule_batch_with_reserve_token.description: schedule an ach batch A with a reserve token D into a settlement window B using an alternate rail C
preconditions: I can only schedule an ach batch A with a reserve token D into a settlement window B using an alternate rail C if it is the case that the batch A is on funding hold and the batch A is reserved by the alternate rail C and reserve token D is available and settlement window B is available and B is the eligible settlement window for batch A and D is the eligible reserve token for batch A
I can only schedule an ach batch A with a reserve token D into a settlement window B using an alternate rail C if it is not the case that the scheduling of batch A is confirmed
effects: Once I schedule an ach batch A with a reserve token D into a settlement window B using an alternate rail C, it is the case that the batch A is scheduled in the settlement window B and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and batch A requires additional checks and batch A is pending operator approval

Once I schedule an ach batch A with a reserve token D into a settlement window B using an alternate rail C, it is not the case anymore that settlement window B is available and it is not the case anymore that reserve token D is available

clear_compliance_liquidity_checks.description: clear compliance liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C
preconditions: I can only clear compliance liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C if it is the case that the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and batch A requires additional checks and the batch A is reserved by the originating bank B and the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank C
effects: Once I clear compliance liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C, it is not the case anymore that batch A requires additional checks and it is not the case anymore that batch A is pending operator approval

approve_batch_liquidity_authorization.description: approve batch liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C with a liquidity provider primary D
preconditions: I can only approve batch liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C with a liquidity provider primary D if it is the case that the batch A is validated by the operator and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and the batch A is reserved by the originating bank B and the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank C and D is the linked liquidity provider group for batch A

I can only approve batch liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C with a liquidity provider primary D if it is not the case that batch A is pending operator approval and it is not the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared
effects: Once I approve batch liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C with a liquidity provider primary D, it is the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared

approve_batch_secondary_liquidity_author.description: approve batch secondary liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an alternate rail B and a clearing channel C with a liquidity provider secondary D
preconditions: I can only approve batch secondary liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an alternate rail B and a clearing channel C with a liquidity provider secondary D if it is the case that the batch A is validated by the operator and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and the batch A is reserved by the alternate rail B and the batch A is reserved by the clearing channel C and D is the linked liquidity provider group for batch A

I can only approve batch secondary liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an alternate rail B and a clearing channel C with a liquidity provider secondary D if it is not the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared
effects: Once I approve batch secondary liquidity authorization for an ach batch A reserved by an alternate rail B and a clearing channel C with a liquidity provider secondary D, it is the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared and batch A is pending operator approval

finalize_batch_liquidity_checks.description: finalize batch liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C
preconditions: I can only finalize batch liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C if it is the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared and batch A is pending operator approval and the batch A is reserved by the originating bank B and the batch A is reserved by the beneficiary bank C
effects: Once I finalize batch liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C, it is the case that batch A is ready for execution

Once I finalize batch liquidity checks for an ach batch A reserved by an originating bank B and a beneficiary bank C, it is not the case anymore that batch A is pending operator approval and it is not the case anymore that the batch A is validated by the operator and it is not the case anymore that batch A requires additional checks

operator_revalidate_batch.description: operator revalidate batch an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C
preconditions: I can only operator revalidate batch an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C if it is the case that batch A is ready for execution and the liquidity for batch A is cleared and the batch A is on funding hold and batch A has file resource B and clearing operator C is available
I can only operator revalidate batch an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C if it is not the case that the batch A is validated by the operator
effects: Once I operator revalidate batch an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B by a clearing operator C, it is the case that the batch A is validated by the operator

mark_batch_ready_for_rail_binding.description: mark an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B as ready for rail binding
preconditions: I can only mark an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B as ready for rail binding if it is the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared and the batch A is validated by the operator and batch A has file resource B

I can only mark an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B as ready for rail binding if it is not the case that batch A is pending operator approval and it is not the case that batch A is ready for rail binding
effects: Once I mark an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B as ready for rail binding, it is the case that batch A is ready for rail binding

apply_credential_to_mark_ready.description: apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A to mark it as ready for rail binding
preconditions: I can only apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A to mark it as ready for rail binding if it is the case that the liquidity for batch A is cleared and the batch A is validated by the operator and authorization credential B is available

I can only apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A to mark it as ready for rail binding if it is not the case that batch A is pending operator approval and it is not the case that batch A is ready for rail binding
effects: Once I apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A to mark it as ready for rail binding, it is the case that batch A is ready for rail binding
Once I apply an authorization credential B to an ach batch A to mark it as ready for rail binding, it is not the case anymore that authorization credential B is available

bind_batch_to_destination_rail.description: bind an ach batch A to a destination rail B
preconditions: I can only bind an ach batch A to a destination rail B if it is the case that batch A is ready for rail binding and destination rail B is available and batch A is mapped to destination rail B
effects: Once I bind an ach batch A to a destination rail B, it is the case that B is the selected destination rail for batch A
Once I bind an ach batch A to a destination rail B, it is not the case anymore that destination rail B is available

bind_ad_hoc_and_scheduled_batch_to_rail.description: bind an ad hoc batch A and a scheduled batch B to a destination rail C
preconditions: I can only bind an ad hoc batch A and a scheduled batch B to a destination rail C if it is the case that the batch A is registered and batch A has an ad hoc flag and batch A is eligible for destination rail C and C is the selected destination rail for batch B
I can only bind an ad hoc batch A and a scheduled batch B to a destination rail C if it is not the case that batch A is bound to destination rail C
effects: Once I bind an ad hoc batch A and a scheduled batch B to a destination rail C, it is the case that batch A is bound to destination rail C

confirm_pre_execution_gate.description: confirm pre execution gate for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B and a clearing operator C
preconditions: I can only confirm pre execution gate for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B and a clearing operator C if it is the case that the batch A is registered and batch A has an ad hoc flag and the batch A is validated by the operator and batch A is ready for rail binding and batch A has file resource B and clearing operator C is available
I can only confirm pre execution gate for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B and a clearing operator C if it is not the case that batch A is pre execution confirmed
effects: Once I confirm pre execution gate for an ach batch A with a nacha file resource B and a clearing operator C, it is the case that batch A is pre execution confirmed

preconditions: I can only finalize an ach batch A if it is the case that batch A is eligible for finalization and the batch A is registered and the batch A is on funding hold and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and the liquidity for batch A is cleared and batch A is ready for rail binding and the batch A is validated by the operator
I can only finalize an ach batch A if it is not the case that batch A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize an ach batch A, it is the case that batch A is finalized

finalize_batch_with_rail.description: finalize an ach batch A with a destination rail B
preconditions: I can only finalize an ach batch A with a destination rail B if it is the case that batch A has an ad hoc flag and the batch A is registered and the batch A is on funding hold and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and the liquidity for batch A is cleared and batch A is ready for rail binding and the batch A is validated by the operator and batch A is bound to destination rail B
I can only finalize an ach batch A with a destination rail B if it is not the case that batch A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize an ach batch A with a destination rail B, it is the case that batch A is finalized

finalize_ad_hoc_batch.description: finalize an ach batch A as an ad hoc batch
preconditions: I can only finalize an ach batch A as an ad hoc batch if it is the case that batch A has an ad hoc flag and the batch A is registered and the batch A is on funding hold and the scheduling of batch A is confirmed and the liquidity for batch A is cleared and batch A is ready for rail binding and the batch A is validated by the operator and batch A is pre execution confirmed
I can only finalize an ach batch A as an ad hoc batch if it is not the case that batch A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize an ach batch A as an ad hoc batch, it is the case that batch A is finalized

action_nl_templates.reserve_funding_for_batch: reserve funding for ach batch {?ach_batch} using funding account {?funding_account}
action_nl_templates.release_funding_from_batch: release funding from ach batch {?ach_batch} using funding account {?funding_account}
action_nl_templates.attach_file_resource: attach nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} to ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.detach_file_resource: detach nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} from ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.lock_batch_routing: lock routing for ach batch {?ach_batch} with nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource}
action_nl_templates.apply_authorization_credential: apply authorization credential {?authorization_credential} to ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.operator_validate_batch: validate ach batch {?ach_batch} using nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} by clearing operator {?clearing_operator}
action_nl_templates.reserve_originating_bank_for_batch: reserve ach batch {?ach_batch} for originating bank {?originating_bank}
action_nl_templates.release_originating_bank_reservation: release reservation of ach batch {?ach_batch} by originating bank {?originating_bank}
action_nl_templates.reserve_beneficiary_bank_for_batch: reserve beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank} for ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.release_beneficiary_bank_reservation: release reservation of beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank} for ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.reserve_alternate_rail_for_batch: reserve alternate rail {?alternate_rail} for ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.release_alternate_rail_reservation: release reservation of ach batch {?ach_batch} from alternate rail {?alternate_rail}
action_nl_templates.reserve_clearing_channel_for_batch: reserve clearing channel {?clearing_channel} for ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.release_clearing_channel_reservation: release reservation of clearing channel {?clearing_channel} for ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates.schedule_batch_into_window: schedule ach batch {?ach_batch} into settlement window {?settlement_window} with originating bank {?originating_bank} and beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank}
action_nl_templates.schedule_batch_with_reserve_token: schedule ach batch {?ach_batch} with reserve token {?reserve_token} into settlement window {?settlement_window} using alternate rail {?alternate_rail}
action_nl_templates.clear_compliance_liquidity_checks: clear compliance liquidity checks for ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by originating bank {?originating_bank} and beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank}
action_nl_templates.approve_batch_liquidity_authorization: approve batch liquidity authorization for ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by originating bank {?originating_bank} and beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank} with liquidity provider primary {?liquidity_provider_primary}
action_nl_templates.approve_batch_secondary_liquidity_author: approve batch secondary liquidity authorization for ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by alternate rail {?alternate_rail} and clearing channel {?clearing_channel} with liquidity provider secondary {?liquidity_provider_secondary}
action_nl_templates.finalize_batch_liquidity_checks: finalize batch liquidity checks for ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by originating bank {?originating_bank} and beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank}
action_nl_templates.operator_revalidate_batch: operator revalidate batch ach batch {?ach_batch} with nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} by clearing operator {?clearing_operator}
action_nl_templates.mark_batch_ready_for_rail_binding: mark ach batch {?ach_batch} with nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} as ready for rail binding
action_nl_templates.apply_credential_to_mark_ready: apply authorization credential {?authorization_credential} to ach batch {?ach_batch} to mark it as ready for rail binding
action_nl_templates.bind_batch_to_destination_rail: bind ach batch {?ach_batch} to destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates.bind_ad_hoc_and_scheduled_batch_to_rail: bind ad hoc batch {?ad_hoc_batch} and scheduled batch {?scheduled_batch} to destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates.confirm_pre_execution_gate: confirm pre-execution gate for ach batch {?ach_batch} with nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} and clearing operator {?clearing_operator}
action_nl_templates.finalize_batch_with_rail: finalize ach batch {?ach_batch} with destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates.finalize_ad_hoc_batch: finalize ach batch {?ach_batch} as an ad hoc batch

predicate_nl_templates.batch_bound_to_destination_rail: batch {?ach_batch} is bound to destination rail {?destination_rail}

predicate_nl_templates.batch_eligible_clearing_channel: {?clearing_channel} is the eligible clearing channel for batch {?ach_batch}

predicate_nl_templates.batch_ad_hoc_flag: batch {?ach_batch} has an ad hoc flag
predicate_nl_templates.batch_to_destination_rail_mapping: batch {?ach_batch} is mapped to destination rail {?destination_rail}

action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_funding_for_batch: reserve funding for an ach batch {?ach_batch} using a funding account {?funding_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_funding_from_batch: release funding from an ach batch {?ach_batch} using a funding account {?funding_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_file_resource: attach a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} to an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_file_resource: detach a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} from an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.lock_batch_routing: lock routing for an ach batch {?ach_batch} with a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_authorization_credential: apply an authorization credential {?authorization_credential} to an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.operator_validate_batch: validate an ach batch {?ach_batch} using a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} by a clearing operator {?clearing_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.operator_validate_rail_binding: operator validate rail binding an ach batch {?ach_batch} a destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_originating_bank_for_batch: reserve an ach batch {?ach_batch} for an originating bank {?originating_bank}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_originating_bank_reservation: release reservation of an ach batch {?ach_batch} by an originating bank {?originating_bank}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_beneficiary_bank_for_batch: reserve a beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank} for an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_beneficiary_bank_reservation: release reservation of a beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank} for an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_alternate_rail_for_batch: reserve an alternate rail {?alternate_rail} for an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_alternate_rail_reservation: release reservation of an ach batch {?ach_batch} from an alternate rail {?alternate_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_clearing_channel_for_batch: reserve a clearing channel {?clearing_channel} for an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_clearing_channel_reservation: release reservation of a clearing channel {?clearing_channel} for an ach batch {?ach_batch}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_batch_into_window: schedule an ach batch {?ach_batch} into a settlement window {?settlement_window} with an originating bank {?originating_bank} and a beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_batch_with_reserve_token: schedule an ach batch {?ach_batch} with a reserve token {?reserve_token} into a settlement window {?settlement_window} using an alternate rail {?alternate_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_compliance_liquidity_checks: clear compliance liquidity checks for an ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by an originating bank {?originating_bank} and a beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_batch_liquidity_authorization: approve batch liquidity authorization for an ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by an originating bank {?originating_bank} and a beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank} with a liquidity provider primary {?liquidity_provider_primary}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_batch_secondary_liquidity_author: approve batch secondary liquidity authorization for an ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by an alternate rail {?alternate_rail} and a clearing channel {?clearing_channel} with a liquidity provider secondary {?liquidity_provider_secondary}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_batch_liquidity_checks: finalize batch liquidity checks for an ach batch {?ach_batch} reserved by an originating bank {?originating_bank} and a beneficiary bank {?beneficiary_bank}
action_nl_templates_indef.operator_revalidate_batch: operator revalidate batch an ach batch {?ach_batch} with a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} by a clearing operator {?clearing_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_batch_ready_for_rail_binding: mark an ach batch {?ach_batch} with a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} as ready for rail binding
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_credential_to_mark_ready: apply an authorization credential {?authorization_credential} to an ach batch {?ach_batch} to mark it as ready for rail binding
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_batch_to_destination_rail: bind an ach batch {?ach_batch} to a destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_ad_hoc_and_scheduled_batch_to_rail: bind an ad hoc batch {?ad_hoc_batch} and a scheduled batch {?scheduled_batch} to a destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_pre_execution_gate: confirm pre-execution gate for an ach batch {?ach_batch} with a nacha file resource {?nacha_file_resource} and a clearing operator {?clearing_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_batch_with_rail: finalize an ach batch {?ach_batch} with a destination rail {?destination_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_ad_hoc_batch: finalize an ach batch {?ach_batch} as an ad hoc batch

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a ach batch or a funding account or a settlement window or a beneficiary bank or a originating bank or a alternate rail or a nacha file resource or a authorization credential or a destination rail or a clearing operator or a reserve token or a clearing channel or a liquidity provider group is also a entity
Everything that is a liquidity provider primary or a liquidity provider secondary is also a liquidity provider group
Everything that is a scheduled batch or a ad hoc batch is also a ach batch
